projections.label: Book Chapter Page Book Page Book Table Of Contents Page Projection
projections.when_to_use: Use for Book Page in Philosophical Writing. Expected structures include heading, list item and paragraph; typical markers include inhaltsverzeichnis, kapitel 1, kapitel 2 and vorwort.
projections.avoid_when: Avoid when content does not match Book Page in Philosophical Writing or lacks heading, list item and paragraph structure.
